name: Raisin Pie (Rosina Pie, "Funeral Pie")
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the raisins and soak them in cold water for 3 hours.
2. Drain the soaked raisins.
3. In a large bowl, combine the 2 cups of water, drained raisins, sugar, flour (mixed together), salt, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind.
4. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir thoroughly.
5. Cook the mixture over hot water for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
7. Pour the filling into a pastry-lined pan.
8. Cover the top with narrow strips of dough, criss-crossed.
9. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 10 minutes.
10. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (180°C) and bake an additional 30 minutes.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
